candidates.title: Vectorize Logos & Packaging
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: *** DO NOT BID IF YOU CANNOT DO IT IN THE GIVEN PRICE RANGE *** I already have AI-generated artwork for my "two" tea brands and one ornamental style logo but it is still in raster form and not ready for production. I need everything redrawn as clean, fully-editable vectors so I can scale them for any application without loss of quality. Scope • Convert the existing logos, standup pouch mock-up into precise vector artwork. • Preserve every colour, gradient, and detail exactly as in the original concept while improving line sharpness and overall balance. • Create a matching front-facing product label that fits naturally with the new vector style. Files & delivery Please deliver the final artwork in AI, SVG, and PDF formats. Each file should be neatly organised in layers, include outlined and editable text versions, and be ready for immediate print or digital use. Because I don’t have fixed

candidates.title: Logo Vector Re-Creation & Text
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I have a logo only available as a JPEG and I’m getting stickers produced, so I need the artwork rebuilt as a clean, fully-scalable vector. The look, colours, and layout should mirror the current design; the only tweak is updating a few words in the text while everything else stays intact. Please redraw it from scratch—not an auto-trace—so curves are crisp and shapes close cleanly. Match the original font where possible or replicate it so the change is seamless. When you’re done, hand over editable vector files (AI or EPS), an SVG, and a print-ready PDF sized for sticker production. I’ll supply the JPEG and details of the wording to swap as soon as you’re on board, then review an initial proof before we finalise the files.

candidates.title: Brand Identity & Marketing Asset Package for Growing PC Company
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price Brand Identity & Marketing Asset Package for Growing PC Company About us: Tech World PC is a growing custom computer company specializing in gaming PCs, workstations, refurbished systems, and computer repair services. We currently sell primarily through eBay and other online marketplaces and are looking to establish a professional, consistent brand identity that can scale with the business. We have already completed the concept phase and have selected a logo direction. We are looking for an experienced branding professional to refine the concept and build a complete production-ready brand package. Important We have AI-generated concept artwork that was used during the brainstorming phase. We are NOT looking for someone to simply trace or convert AI images into SVG files. candidates.title: Convert Flat Logo to Clean Vector Redraw (AI, SVG, EPS) + Refinements for Brand Use
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price I have an existing logo concept created (flat design). I am looking for a professional designer to recreate this logo as clean, original vector artwork and refine it for professional use. The goal is to preserve the current concept while improving overall polish, balance, and scalability so the logo is suitable for commercial use and trademark consideration. Scope of Work * Manually recreate the existing logo as fully editable vector artwork (not a simple trace) * Refine spacing, alignment, and typography where needed for a more professional finish * Ensure the final design is clean, original, and not based on Canva assets, templates, or stock elements * Maintain the overall concept and layout while improving visual quality * The wordmark should be designed in a flexible, modular way so it can be reused across future service lines while maintaining consistent brand i

candidates.title: Logo Design
candidates.brief: Upwork · Hourly ( THIS CONCEPT LOGO WAS CREATED BY AI. ) Looking for a graphic designer to professionally recreate and vectorize the attached logo exactly as shown. I do NOT want a redesign or new concept — I want the same logo, same colors, same layout, and same style, professionally converted into production-ready files. Requirements: Recreate logo in high-quality vector format Keep the exact design/colors/layout Create a standalone lotus icon version for branding/social media/favicon use Provide transparent background versions Provide print-ready and web-ready files Final files needed: AI EPS SVG PDF PNG (transparent) JPG Please also include: Color codes used Font names (or closest match ) Black and white version Full logo + icon-only versions IMPORTANT: I do not want a similar font or a redesigned version.
